description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.44.1

You can now add friends using only the icons at the bottom of the screen.

• Friend-add icon displays invitation QR code on the spot — one person uses the friend-add icon, the other uses the camera icon. Just two side-by-side buttons to become push-friends
• When sending an invitation by URL, expiration date and time are now clearly shown — sent in the format "Valid until 2026-06-11 21:45:42"
• Fixed popup background that was appearing gray

v1.44.0

We refreshed the "Share & Connect" section to spread the word about Myはんのう.

• 📱 Tap the QR code to display it large — you can also copy the URL directly
• Added "🍻 Connect with Friends" to the service menu — direct access to the push-friend feature
• Fixed line wrapping on footer links
